labels.note: The constructor repeatedly creates a Document, obtains template contents, and inserts the document into the templates map.
labels.refactoringNote: Store template names and contents in a map or external files, then loop over the entries to create and register Document objects.

labels.note: getContents() contains a large conditional algorithm and embeds all article, book, letter, and report template contents in one method.
labels.refactoringNote: Replace the conditional template-selection algorithm with a map from template names to contents, or load each template from a separate file.

labels.note: getContents() repeats similar LaTeX document fragments and string-concatenation structures across its template branches.
labels.refactoringNote: Represent each template as data in a map or external file rather than maintaining repeated construction branches in getContents().
